text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're amazing! You got so many!
choice_data_list: Good thing there's enough for you, too.
Good thing there's enough for you, too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You won some for me, too?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So that's why you nabbed this many... Wow.
Getting some for my sisters would've been more
than enough...
choice_data_list: Well, you did say they were cute.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoops, did I say that out loud?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. To tell you the truth, I'm really happy
right now. Thanks so much!
